name: Northwest Bancshares, Inc.
business: Northwest Bancshares, Inc. is a financial holding company that, through its subsidiary Northwest Bank, offers personal and commercial banking solutions, investment management and trust services. It operates 161 community banking locations in Pennsylvania, western New York, northeastern Ohio, and Indiana. Its principal lending activities are residential mortgage, consumer, commercial real estate, and commercial business loans.
sellsTo: individuals in Pennsylvania, New York, Ohio, and Indiana
businesses in Pennsylvania, New York, Ohio, and Indiana

exposures.sentence: cyber-security concerns, including an interruption or breach in the security of our website or other information systems
